title: Settings Page
content:
## Settings Page

The `SettingsPage` component is a React functional component responsible for rendering the main settings interface for the user.

### Purpose

This page is intended to provide users with a centralized location to manage their account details and application preferences. Currently, it serves as a placeholder, indicating that the full settings functionality is under development.

### Key Exports

- `SettingsPage`: A default export representing the React component for the settings page.

### Usage

This component is likely used within the application's routing system to be displayed when a user navigates to the `/dashboard/settings` route.

```tsx
// Example of how SettingsPage might be imported and used in a router
import SettingsPage from './page';

// ... in your routing configuration ...
<Route path="/dashboard/settings" element={<SettingsPage />} />
```

### Current State

As of the current implementation, the settings page displays a "Settings coming soon." message, signifying that the actual setting management features have not yet been implemented.
